name: 180 Unispin
definition: Feet leave pedals, unicycle spins 180 degrees, feet land back on pedals

name: 360 Unispin

definition: Feet leave pedals, unicycle spins 900 degrees, feet land back on pedals

name: 1080 Unispin
definition: Feet leave pedals, unicycle spins 1080 degrees, feet land back on pedals

name: 1260 Unispin
definition: Feet leave pedals, unicycle spins 1260 degrees, feet land back on pedals

name: Crankflip
definition: Feet leave pedals, wheel rotates forward once, feet land back on pedals

definition: Feet leave pedals, wheel rotates forward three times, feet land back on pedals

definition: Feet leave pedals, wheel rotates forward five times, feet land back on pedals

definition: Feet leave pedals, wheel rotates forward six times, feet land back on pedals

name: Whip
definition: Frame rotates once around the wheel while rider stays stationary

definition: Frame rotates around the wheel with extended rotation

definition: Frame whip variation

definition: Frame whip variation

name: Overflip
definition: No footer, wheel rotates forward once over the top

name: Doubleoverflip
definition: No footer, wheel rotates forward twice over the top

name: Tripleoverflip
definition: No footer, wheel rotates forward three times over the top

name: Underflip
definition: No footer, wheel rotates backward once under

name: Doubleunderflip
definition: No footer, wheel rotates backward twice under

name: Tripleunderflip
definition: No footer, wheel rotates backward three times under

name: Stutterflip
definition: Crankflip then catch front pedal and overflip

name: Doublestutterflip
definition: Doubleflip then catch front pedal and overflip

name: Triplestutterflip
definition: Tripleflip then catch front pedal and overflip
